---
name: Bug report
about: Report something broken
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Screenshots/logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste logs to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Godot Version: [e.g. 4.3]
- .NET Version: [e.g. 8.0]

## Possible fix (optional)
Any suggestions or ideas for a fix.
